name: Launch Unusual EC2 Instance Types for Cryptomining
description: Simulates an attacker launching GPU or compute-optimized EC2 instances (p2.xlarge or similar) associated with cryptocurrency mining, triggering GuardDuty findings and unexpected cost spikes.
prerequisites: None — the attack creates and immediately terminates its own EC2 instance
detection_signal: ec2:RunInstances with unusual instance types (GPU, high-compute) not in baseline; GuardDuty CryptoCurrency:EC2/BitcoinTool.B if mining traffic detected
